description: Create a traffic accident reconstruction sketch in EdrawMax for a police report regarding a T-bone collision at the intersection of 'Oak Street' (North-South) and 'Pine Avenue' (East-West). The diagram must include a 4-way intersection labeled with the street names, a North Arrow, Vehicle 1 (a Blue Sedan) traveling North on Oak Street, and Vehicle 2 (a Red SUV) traveling East on Pine Avenue colliding with Vehicle 1. Include 'Skid marks' behind the Blue Sedan and a text box titled 'Case #2024-891'. Save the diagram as /home/ga/Documents/accident_sketch_2024_891.eddx and export it as /home/ga/Documents/accident_sketch_2024_891.pdf.
